title: board_intake.py: Dict returns should use dataclass for type safety
description:
Functions in board_intake.py return `list[dict[str, Any]]` with fixed schemas that would benefit from dataclasses:

**Locations:**
- `find_unresolved_questions()` (line 443): returns dicts with keys: id, kind, question, sources
- `build_zephyr_port_checklist()` (line 622): returns dicts with keys: id, title, evidence_required, status
- `build_follow_up_beads()` (line 647): returns dicts with keys: title, description, labels, blocked_by_hardware_validation

**Recommended fix:**
```python
@dataclass(frozen=True)
class UnresolvedQuestion:
    id: str
    kind: QuestionKind
    question: str
    sources: list[SourceRef]

@dataclass(frozen=True)
class ChecklistItem:
    id: str
    title: str
    evidence_required: list[str]
    status: ChecklistStatus
```
